data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — ticket-edit.sh uses ALLOWED_FIELDS + builds EDIT event JSON; reducer handles EDIT by iterating fields dict and applying to state; ticket-show.sh naturally outputs all reducer state fields. Need to: (1) add 'tags' to ALLOWED_FIELDS in ticket-edit.sh, (2) add 'tags': [] to initial state dict in ticket-reducer.py with array handling in EDIT event processing, (3) ticket-show.sh needs no changes since it outputs raw reducer JSON.
